**Decide ‚Äî gates cleared**:
- **Rotation:** 337 % 2 = 1 ‚Üí **adult** (kids resumes 338). No blocker on disk; nothing in-progress <70% (371 shipped demoable last fire).
- **JURY-directed pick (FEED the legible lane; take the score-follower):** JURY 2026-06-06 provocation #1 = *"Build the obvious next one: a real-time score-follower / live-accompaniment tool (the banked live-accompanist that lost curation 3√ó on verifiability ‚Äî solve it the way 358 did, with a known internal answer)."* Cycle 335 took the JURY's *other* option (chord/key analyzer ‚Üí `370-tonal-map`), leaving the score-follower the open ask. **Took it.** Directly addresses cycle 335's three documented rejection reasons (see Research above + the ¬ß335 entry) ‚Äî the reframe is the whole point.

(Note: cycles 333/334/335 were DEEP, 336 WIDE; this DEEP is justified by the single-concept JURY ask ‚Äî next adult should consider WIDE.)

  - **(#2) ‚â•3 subsystems** ‚Äî input layer (baked demo / computer-keyboard / Web MIDI, one pipe) + **online-DTW follower** (`dtw.ts`, bounded-window forward recurrence, forward-only commit, slope‚Üítempo) + **Web-Audio elastic accompaniment** (functional D-major bass+chord, decay scaled by tempo) + **raw-WebGL2 warping-path renderer** = 4.
  - **(#3) Named reference** ‚Äî **Matchmaker** (arXiv:2510.10087, Oct 2025) ¬∑ **Dixon MATCH** (2005). (The ACCompanion 2304.12939 is the thread's expressive north-star.)

- **Diversity audit** (last-10 shipped {371,370,368,365,360,358,355,353,350,347}): VIBE **kids ‚â•5√ó** (structural rotation ‚Äî adult cycle is the standing carve-out, not a flaw); INPUT ‚Äî touch ~3√ó (360/355/350), mic 2√ó (371/358), no value ‚â•4 on the discriminating axis; OUTPUT ‚Äî WebGL2/three.js (GPU) dominate, which is what the JURY *wants more of* (inline-SVG, the JURY's banned output, = 0 here). Plus the standing **JURY hard bans: touch INPUT ¬∑ mic/voice INPUT ¬∑ inline-SVG OUTPUT ¬∑ adult-JI-drone VIBE.** `diversity: banned=[kids VIBE (structural) ¬∑ touch INPUT (JURY) ¬∑ mic/voice INPUT (JURY) ¬∑ inline-SVG OUTPUT (JURY) ¬∑ adult-JI-drone VIBE (JURY)] ¬∑ picked(375)=[**keyboard/MIDI/baked-demo INPUT** (NOT touch, NOT mic) ¬∑ **raw-WebGL2 warping-path GPU OUTPUT** (NOT SVG; the JURY-encouraged GPU path) ¬∑ **online-DTW alignment + warping-path-viz + elastic-accompaniment TECHNIQUE** ¬∑ **instrumental / legible / live-performance VIBE** (NOT a JI-drone)]`. Winner uses **none** of the banned tags. *Honest caveat (same as ¬ß335):* the "legible/instructional" VIBE is itself frequent in the last-10 (370/365/358/353) ‚Äî but the JURY *explicitly directs the lab to FEED that lane* ("that's the direction to feed"), so it's intentional, not a rut. Noted, not hidden.

**Mode / orchestration**: DEEP ‚Äî 3 folder-isolated Builders (374 HMM / 375 DTW / 376 cue-FSM) spawned concurrently in a single message, each fully self-contained (own folder, no git, no shared-doc edits, no cross-imports). I (Orchestrator/Planner/Curator) verified **from the actual code + READMEs + an authoritative build**, not builder self-reports. Read `375/page.tsx` end-to-end (clean input-pipe, proper rAF/AudioContext/MIDI cleanup on unmount, typography-compliant, WebGL2 fallback wired) + all three READMEs; ran a **3-up diagnostic `npm run build` ‚Üí exit 0** (all three compile + lint clean; the only flag was builder-374 *reporting* a transient lint state in 375 that did not reproduce in the authoritative build).
- **`375-tempo-canon` (WINNER ‚Üí shipped)** ‚Äî online DTW, warping-path. **Won on three axes:** (a) **legibility** ‚Äî the bending warping diagonal is the single most legible "watch the machine follow you" picture (reference-time √ó performance-time, the path bends with rubato), the cycle's whole point and the JURY's #1 directive; (b) **diversity/anti-screen-habit** ‚Äî `374`'s score-river is the lab's most *familiar* form (close to `24-piano-roll`/`13-piano-canvas`), where the warping path is a genuinely fresh visual and a real answer to the JURY's "stop relocating the screen-viz"; (c) **freshness** ‚Äî carries the freshest dated named ref (**Matchmaker, Oct 2025**), paying down the JURY's "freshness mandate failed ~6 dives / implement one recent named work" debt. See INDEX/README.
- **`374-the-accompanist` (banked ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß337, `rm -rf`'d)** ‚Äî HMM/forward probabilistic follower (transition kernel + pitch-likelihood floor for robustness + argmax commit + **confidence meter** the others lack), score-river WebGL2. Build-clean. **Didn't win**: most-familiar visual + lower surprise than the warping path. **It is the designated cycle-2 deepening** ‚Äî the HMM belief is the right substrate for expressive (dynamics/articulation) following + the confidence readout is the missing legibility handle.
- **`376-the-prompter` (banked ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß337, `rm -rf`'d)** ‚Äî cue/anchor FSM (Antescofo-style), commits only at anchors ‚Üí **robust to wrong/extra/hesitant notes**; its demo bakes in deliberate wrong notes and a **build-time simulation proved 8/8 cues fire correctly** (the strongest verification posture of the three). ## Cycle 335 ‚Äî 2026-06-06 (UTC) ‚Äî adult build ¬∑ DEEP (3 legibility approaches to ONE concept) ¬∑ SHIPS `370-tonal-map` ‚Äî the **deepening of the Spiral-Array thread** the JURY keeps demanding, finally shipped, and shipped *fixed for legibility*. Implements **Elaine Chew's Spiral Array** (MIT, 2000) tonal model ‚Äî the music's **center of effect** (weighted centroid of sounding pitch-class points) ‚Äî but renders it as a **top-down, labeled circle-of-fifths MAP** so the abstract 3-D helix that sank `364-tonal-orbit` becomes a readable map you navigate: a bright **comet of tonal gravity** glides across named key territories, a **modulation is literally the comet crossing from the "C" disc to the "G" disc**, and a fading **trail** shows where it's been. The surprising legibility move (straight from today's research): the **tonal-focus** scalar ‚Äî how concentrated recent pitch content is around the center of gravity (arXiv:2603.27035, gravitational centering) ‚Äî drives the comet's **halo radius**, so you *see* focus tighten in-key and **bloom wide the instant a modulation begins**, not just read a number. Internal demo auto-plays a deliberately dramatic modulating journey (C‚ÜíG‚ÜíD‚ÜíEm‚ÜíC) so the comet visibly tours the map at the 06:30 phone review; **Web MIDI** feeds a pianist's own playing into the identical pipeline. HUD: key / chord / Roman numeral / modulation banner / tonal-focus meter + a teaching legend.

## Cycle 334 ‚Äî 2026-06-06 (UTC) ‚Äî kids build ¬∑ DEEP (3 play-models of ONE concept) ¬∑ SHIPS `368-kids-rainbow-quest` ‚Äî the lab's **first color-foraging *game***: a friendly unicorn shows a glowing color and *wants* it, so a 4-year-old goes and **points the phone camera at something that color in the real world** (red, then orange, then yellow‚Ä¶). Getting close makes the creature **glow warmer** with a rising musical shimmer; holding the match ~0.6s triggers a **fanfare + sparkle burst** and fills a **rainbow arc** across the top; collect all seven ‚Üí the arc plays a **rainbow song** and loops with a fresh shuffle. No reading, no timer, no score, no fail ‚Äî and crucially it gets the child *off the couch into their room* (the most direct answer yet to the JURY's "stop staring at the screen"). Color‚Üípitch is the most legible kids mapping (KIDS.md: "color is the language"); each hue ‚Üí a note in **D-Dorian** (NOT C-pentatonic) over an always-on D+A drone; **camera is analysis-only** (no recording, no upload, no network). Plays itself hands-free via auto-demo at the 06:30 review when there's no camera.

## Cycle 333 ‚Äî 2026-06-06 (UTC) ‚Äî adult build ¬∑ DEEP (3 technical approaches to ONE concept) ¬∑ SHIPS `365-cadence-ladder` ‚Äî a real-time **tonal/functional harmonic analyst**: it names the KEY you're in, the Roman-numeral FUNCTION of every chord, and makes the *pull-and-resolve of harmony visible* as a three.js tension ladder (Tonic at rest on the bottom ¬∑ Subdominant departing in the middle ¬∑ Dominant pulling at the top). Each chord drops into its functional zone as a glowing block; **cadences flash named resolving arcs** ‚Äî V‚ÜíI *authentic* (emerald), IV‚ÜíI *plagal/"amen"* (violet), V‚Üívi *deceptive* (amber); when the music **modulates** a ripple sweeps the scene and every Roman numeral re-contextualises (the same chord changes function as the key shifts). The lab's **first key-estimation + functional/cadence analysis** (grep-verified ‚Äî `229-chord-canvas` names chords but does NO key, NO Roman numerals, NO cadence/function). Proves itself 358-style: an internally-authored progression (C major with authentic/deceptive/plagal cadences ‚Üí modulates to G major) is **known ground truth**, so the analyzer is watched proving itself on a phone with no hardware; **Web MIDI** lets a pianist play their own chords into the identical pipeline. Auto-plays on Begin; alive in ~10 s at the 06:30 review.

**Decide gates (all cleared):**
- **Rotation:** 333 % 2 = 1 ‚Üí **adult** (kids resumes 334). No blocker on disk; nothing in-progress <70% (360 shipped demoable last fire).
- **JURY-directed pick:** JURY 2026-06-06's loudest adult provocation is *"feed the legible/instructional lane ‚Äî build the obvious next one: a real-time score-follower or a **chord/key analyzer that names the harmony you play**"* (its named wins were the legible 358/353/345) AND *"starve the adult JI-drone monoculture."* I took the analyzer, deepened past mere chord-naming (already in lab at 229) into **key-finding + functional/cadence analysis** ‚Äî the instructional lane the jury asked to feed. (Deliberately did NOT take the jury's other option, deepening Mirror-Canon cycle-2; banked the Spiral-Array runner-up as the multi-cycle thread to deepen instead ‚Äî noted below.)
- **Research-first ‚Üí build chain:** RESEARCH ¬ß333 (today) ‚Äî Krumhansl-Schmuckler key-finding is commodity in standalone tools (wutools, Meyda-based browser detectors, arXiv 2505.17259 "Audio Key Detection," May 2025) but **grep-clean in this lab**; the empty shelf is *functional* analysis (key + Roman numeral + cadence), not chord-naming. Build implements that hook directly. Chain visible.
- **Ambition floor (4/5):** `ambition: #1 never-used-technique (Krumhansl-Schmuckler key estimation + Roman-numeral functional labeling + cadence detection + modulation tracking ‚Äî grep-verified lab-first; 229 does chord-NAME only) + #2 ‚â•3 subsystems (decaying pitch-class profile + K-S key estimator w/ hysteresis + chord-quality template matcher + Riemann functional/cadence mapper + three.js ladder render + Web-Audio synth = 6) + #3 named reference (Krumhansl & Kessler 1982 probe-tone profiles ¬∑ Temperley 2001 ¬∑ Riemann 1893 functional harmony ¬∑ Aldwell & Schachter cadence tradition) + #5 recent-research (RESEARCH ¬ß333 today)`.
- **Diversity audit (vs last 10 shipped = 360,358,355,353,350,347,346,345,341,337):** OUTPUT ‚Äî raw-WebGL2 4√ó (360,347,345,341 ‚Üí WARM/avoid), DOM/CSS 3√ó (355,353,346), three.js 2√ó (358,337 ‚Äî safe), SVG 1√ó (350, jury-banned separately). INPUT ‚Äî touch & mic/voice jury-BANNED; tilt/seed/clock/keyboard/external spread thin. `diversity: banned (JURY 2026-06-06)=[touch INPUT ¬∑ mic/voice INPUT ¬∑ inline-SVG OUTPUT ¬∑ adult-JI-drone VIBE] + (self) raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT (warm 4√ó)] ¬∑ picked=[MIDI/internal-demo INPUT (NOT touch, NOT mic) ¬∑ three.js OUTPUT (2√ó ‚Äî cools the warm raw-WebGL2; NOT SVG) ¬∑ K-S-key-finding/functional-analysis TECHNIQUE (lab-first) ¬∑ instructional/legible VIBE (NOT a JI-drone)]`. Dodges every HARD ban; cools the warm raw-WebGL2 renderer.

Chosen per the orchestration rule (read JURY first): the jury wanted the instructional lane *deepened*, and DEEP-on-one-concept is the tool for "ship the depth, not a fourth fresh explorer."

No single love forced the pick; the JURY's instructional-lane directive governed.

**Orchestration (DEEP, 3 folder-isolated builders, parallel; pre-allocated 363/364/365):**

The **most ambitious/surprising technique** of the slate (a genuine lab-first spatial-tonality model) but **lost on legibility** ‚Äî an abstract sphere drifting in a helix is exactly the abstraction the jury is steering the lab AWAY from. **Flagged as the multi-cycle thread to deepen** next adult cycle (it's the jury's "actually deepen something" answer in a fresh, non-Mirror-Canon form).
- **`363-key-compass` (banked ‚Üí IDEAS ¬ß333, moved to /tmp)** ‚Äî circle-of-fifths key wheel that **rotates to re-center on modulation** (the cleanest single "the ground moved" gesture); demo modulates C‚ÜíG‚ÜíEb (a bVI surprise to test the hysteresis). The **most iconic/immediately-readable** of the three but "only" names key+function (no cadence/tension teaching). Strong as a simpler companion or to fold its rotating-wheel gesture into 365.

## Cycle 332 ‚Äî 2026-06-06 14:26 UTC ‚Äî kids build ¬∑ WIDE (3 UNRELATED lab-first simulation toys) ¬∑ SHIPS `360-kids-sand-choir` ‚Äî the lab's **first falling-sand granular cellular automaton** (grep-verified 0 across 350+ prototypes). A 4-year-old pours streams of glowing warm sand from a top spout; **tilting the iPad** turns the world's gravity so the dunes flow and reshape left/right/down; seven harp strings tuned to **D-Dorian** cross the lower field, and every grain that comes to *rest on a string* plucks a soft Karplus‚ÄìStrong note ‚Äî so **the shape of the dune you build IS the song** (the most legible cross-modal mapping the kids lane can make, the direct answer to the JURY's standing #1 "make it legible"). Auto-sways and plucks itself hands-free for the 06:30 phone review (no sensor needed); pointer-drag fallback on desktop; always-on D+A pad + brick-wall limiter so it's never silent and never harsh.

Build implements that dive's falling-sand hook directly. Chain visible.

- **Diversity audit (vs last 10 = 358,355,353,350,347,346,345,341,337,334):** `diversity: banned (JURY 2026-06-06)=[touch INPUT ¬∑ mic/voice INPUT ¬∑ inline-SVG OUTPUT ¬∑ adult-JI-drone VIBE] ¬∑ picked=[tilt INPUT ¬∑ WebGL2 OUTPUT ¬∑ falling-sand-CA TECHNIQUE ¬∑ kids-warm-elemental VIBE]`. - **`360-kids-sand-choir` (WINNER ‚Üí shipped)** ‚Äî falling-sand granular CA + tilt + D-Dorian Karplus + WebGL2. **Won** on: the headline/most-recognizable lab-first technique; the **most legible** mapping of the three (dune shape ‚Üî song ‚Äî a 4yo sees cause‚Üíeffect directly, where DLA growth is stochastic and sandpile avalanches are unpredictable); **warm-earth palette** breaking the recent cool/jewel run; and the most robust audio (pre-rendered Karplus plucks). ## Cycle 330 ‚Äî 2026-06-06 10:30 UTC ‚Äî kids build ¬∑ DEEP (3 play-models for ONE concept) ¬∑ SHIPS `355-kids-glass-armonica` ‚Äî a **Benjamin Franklin glass armonica** for kids: a row of 8 glasses you TUNE by dragging water up/down (more water = lower pitch ‚Äî the water level you SEE *is* the pitch you hear, the most literal cross-modal mapping the lab can make), then PLAY by **swiping a finger across the rims** so each glass the finger crosses *sings* a sustained, breathy, overlapping wash (the famous "otherworldly" armonica sustain ‚Äî NOT a struck bell). A ghost-finger auto-demo sweeps back and forth for ~12 s so the instrument plays itself at the 06:30 open. The lab's **first fill-to-tune instrument** and **first rubbed-glass continuous-armonica voice** ‚Äî water as a legible pitch dial, the inverse of an abstract glow.

## Cycle 329 ‚Äî 2026-06-06 (UTC) ‚Äî adult build ¬∑ WIDE (3 UNRELATED explorers) ¬∑ SHIPS `353-collapse-score` ‚Äî an adult generative piece that COMPOSES ITSELF in front of you by **Wave Function Collapse**, the lab's FIRST WFC piece (grep-verified 0 across 350+ prototypes). An 8√ó16 lattice (8 voice layers √ó 16 beat columns) begins in superposition; the solver collapses the lowest-Shannon-entropy cell to a weighted-random D-Dorian note, then BFS-propagates harmonic adjacency constraints to its neighbours ‚Äî and you WATCH it: dim candidate-count cells snap to bright note-labelled cells, constrained neighbours flash as the ripple spreads, while a playhead sweeps left‚Üíright and SOUNDS each collapsed note (FM pad + bell). Composition as a *visible logical process* ‚Äî the exact inverse of the "abstract glowing cloud" the jury asked us to kill (the most literal answer to jury #1: make it LEGIBLE). Seeded mulberry32 ‚Üí deterministic Replay; auto-reseeds on fill (long-form, never the same twice). Auto-plays on load (one **Begin** tap only if autoplay blocked), alive at the 06:30 review with full payoff in ~10 seconds.

NO force-push divergence. Highest on-disk folder = 350 ‚Üí pre-allocated **351/352/353** to the three WIDE Builders (collision-free; note cycles 327/328 used 348/349/351/352 as TEXT bank slugs ‚Äî not on disk, no collision). ## Cycle 328 ‚Äî 2026-06-06 (UTC) ‚Äî kids build ¬∑ DEEP (3 physics/interaction approaches to ONE concept) ¬∑ SHIPS `350-kids-bump-along` ‚Äî the lab's FIRST chain-reaction music machine for kids (110+ kids prototypes, ZERO chain-reaction pieces before ‚Äî grep-verified): a row of 7 sleepy, breathing creatures (each a bold color + a C-major-pentatonic note, BANDIMAL left=low‚Üíright=high); tap one and a visible "bump" travels down the line ‚Äî each creature wakes, squash-stretches, and SINGS as the wave reaches it ‚Äî then it reflects off the far end and rolls back for a return melody. Tap the middle ‚Üí two waves outward; tap both ends ‚Üí they meet in the middle (a chord). DRAG a creature sideways to reorder the row ‚Üí the wave plays the new order (composition by rearrangement). One little push ‚Üí a whole melodic wave you can WATCH travel, bounce, and return. Auto-plays itself hands-free (a demo bump fires from the left every ~5.5s while idle; creatures breathe perpetually), so it's alive at the 06:30 review with zero interaction.

**Git sync / env**: clean fire ‚Äî `git fetch && checkout main && pull --ff-only` fast-forwarded `2e98f5e..4b208dd` (HEAD = cycle 327 `347-the-place`; 24 commits + tags pulled). NO force-push divergence. On-disk AGENT.md = current full 386-line version (AMBITION & DIVERSITY + MULTI-AGENT ORCHESTRATION present). `node_modules` shipped absent ‚Üí `npm ci` before the authoritative build (`next` confirmed installed; node v22). Worked directly on main; scoped `git add` to `docs/dreams/` + `src/app/dream/350-kids-bump-along/`. (b) **verifiability (JURY #5, a live priority)** ‚Äî the most robust of the three: the dim DOM/CSS compass *glow* + a **tap-the-center shortcut** mean the entire find‚Üícollect‚Üícelebrate loop completes *visually* even when HRTF perception is weak, on speakers, or with no sensor (auto-demo), so it's playable + auditionable in-sandbox despite the honest HRTF-perception unknown; (c) **reward legibility** ‚Äî the swoop-to-center + chime + sparkle + haptic per animal is the most discrete, unmistakable "I caught it!" event (348's progress-bar is close; 347 has none); (d) **richest subsystem count** + cleanest embodiment of "play music with your ears." **`348-kids-song-catcher`** (the most jury-#1-legible ‚Äî you assemble a *known* melody note-by-note into a visible ribbon) **lost only on surprise/playability** (localizing a single note by ear is harder for a 4yo than 6 simultaneous distinct timbres; "collect animals" out-charms "catch notes") and is **re-flagged as the strong next-kids build**. **`347-kids-echo-cave`** (simplest interaction, lovely spatial round) **banked but flagged**: the call-and-echo lane is jury-saturated (94/102/142/280/298‚Ä¶), its differentiation is "real but subtle" (its own README), and it has the weakest reward legibility + least agency ‚Äî resurrect ONLY if differentiated (make turning *required* to wake each creature). ## Cycle 325 ‚Äî 2026-06-06 (UTC) ‚Äî adult build ¬∑ WIDE (3 unrelated explorers) ¬∑ SHIPS `345-speech-melody` ‚Äî the lab's FIRST natural-language ‚Üí music piece: type a line (a poem, a memory) and Resonance compiles its SPEECH into a Jan√°ƒçek-style "speech melody" ‚Äî each word's vowels become pitches on a D-Dorian ladder (vowel height ‚Üí pitch height), its consonant clusters become percussion (plosive‚Üíclick, voiced-stop‚Üíthud, sibilant‚Üíhiss, liquid/nasal‚Üíring), word stress + capitalization + sentence position ‚Üí accent/duration, punctuation ‚Üí rests/phrase-breaks ‚Äî deterministic (same text ‚Üí same melody), and the typed WORDS light up one at a time as they sound over a glowing raw-WebGL2 pitch-contour ribbon, so you RECOGNIZE your own words being sung. Directly answers the jury's #1 live provocation ("make his music LEGIBLE ‚Äî let him recognize what he played, not another nebula"). Auto-plays a Welcome-Home line on load (alive at the 06:30 review with zero typing); fully usable on a phone by typing.

**Git sync / env**: clean fire ‚Äî `git fetch && checkout main && pull --ff-only` fast-forwarded `2e98f5e..18d6e58` (HEAD = cycle 324 `341-kids-star-pair`; 21 commits + tags pulled). Chain today's-research ‚Üí today's-build is direct (path-a/c): ¬ß325's cross-modal framing ‚Üí the WIDE-3 slate aimed one explorer at the genuine text‚Üímusic gap (the winner) + two at the other thin adult axes (score-following, long-form).

## Cycle 324 ‚Äî 2026-06-05 (UTC) ‚Äî kids build ¬∑ DEEP (3 interaction-model approaches to ONE concept) ¬∑ SHIPS `341-kids-star-pair` ‚Äî the lab's FIRST real-time SIMULTANEOUS two-child co-play piece: two children, each on their own screen, each hold ONE glowing star and slide it (or hum) up/down until the two stars sing in tune and LINK with a beam of light. The two voices sound continuously over a D drone; out of tune you HEAR real acoustic beating + SEE the stars jitter; land within ¬±35¬¢ of a just-intonation ratio and the beating vanishes, a bright beam snaps between the stars, they pulse together, a chime rings, ~60 sparkles burst ‚Äî one discrete, *silently-legible* "we connected!" event. Drag is the 4yo-primary control (hum yields to it); solo on one phone ‚Üí a robot ü§ñ drives the far star, pausing near consonances, so the whole find-the-lock loop reaches the reward with no second device AND no mic.

Scored on ambition floor (all clear), the prototype-quality bar (all met), diversity (all dodge the bans), surprise, and JURY guidance ‚Äî and the decisive discriminators were **JURY #3 + #5**. **Why 337 won**: (a) **JURY #3 ‚Äî the decisive gate**: real-world-data is the lab's thinnest adult shelf (the jury *praised* `314-solar-wind` for filling it and asked for MORE), and 337 ships it as a real **three.js 3-D rotating globe**, "massively bigger" than the banked SVG `328-seismic-choir` it supersedes ‚Äî *and the 3-D globe dodges the SVG renderer ban* (‚â•5√ó) that would have compromised 328; (b) **JURY #5 (verification debt, a live priority ‚Äî the lab carries it; `323`/`327` never ran on real GPU)**: 337 is the **most verifiable** of the three ‚Äî the always-loaded sample-quake fallback guarantees both the globe and the spatial choir are alive at the 06:30 review *regardless of network*, with an honest provenance badge, and there is **no GPU/WGSL blind spot** (plain three.js + Web Audio HRTF, logic-traceable); (c) **surprise + partial legibility (#1)**: the highest "huh ‚Äî the planet as a chord," with depth driving **both** point-hue *and* lowpass-darkness so what you see and hear share one geometry, and it names the loudest places + magnitudes (a step toward jury #1's "legible, not a nebula"); (d) **diversity is cleanest** ‚Äî external-API INPUT (0√ó in the last 10) + three.js OUTPUT (dodges BOTH hard renderer bans) + data-sonification + planetary VIBE. **`338-live-accompanist`** (the BOLDEST/most-ambitious swing ‚Äî listen to a live acoustic instrument and a generative band locks to your tempo + key; Karel's standing "jazz-responsive alternate arc" wishlist + the ‚âà0√ó score-following/live-performance axis) **lost ONLY on verifiability** ‚Äî real-time onset/tempo/key tracking on a live acoustic source is the hardest-to-audition headline of the slate (its own README is honest that it'll be rough on sustained/reverberant/polyphonic input), and with the jury making verification debt a live priority I would not ship a headline I can't confirm works ‚Äî **re-flagged as the strong next-adult build, paired with a real-instrument verification pass** (the Auto-demo-through-the-same-analyser path is a clean design and de-risks the demo, but the live "wow" is unproven). **`339-slow-machine`** (the deterministic seeded 6-section long-form generative machine; Ikeda-minimal, fully verifiable since it has no input) **banked** ‚Äî clean and the most reliably demoable, but lowest on surprise/ambition (generative-ambient is the most well-trodden lane of the three). Both losers moved to `/tmp/dream-losers/` and banked to IDEAS as text (no half-built folders in the commit).

**Validate**: `npm ci` (exit 0, run at Orient) ‚Üí moved 338 + 339 to `/tmp/dream-losers/` ‚Üí authoritative `npm run build` with **only 337 present** ‚Üí **‚úì Compiled successfully in 35.3s, exit 0**, full route table emitted, `/dream/337-seismic-globe ‚óã (Static) 5.32 kB` (**293 kB First Load ‚Äî three.js IS bundled here, by design: the heavier bundle is the cost of dodging the SVG ban with a real 3-D globe**, vs the ~108 kB of the recent SVG pieces). **No fix attempts needed** (337 was build-clean as delivered). Remaining build warnings are pre-existing non-dream Resonance code (fonts, unused vars in `recording`/`insights`/etc.). **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** ‚Äî the real unverified risks (per the README): live USGS feed reachability from the review device (sample fallback + honest badge cover a no); HRTF azimuth/elevation vividness is headphone- and listener-dependent; exact loudness across the full chain during a dense `all_hour` swarm (capped at 24 voices + brick-wall compressor mitigate).

The multi-user axis is open for kids (334) ‚Äî deepen it. OR `336-kids-echo-relay` only if differentiated from the saturated echo lane.
- **Cycle 325 (adult): SHIP `338-live-accompanist`** ‚Äî the re-flagged BOLDEST swing (live acoustic instrument ‚Üí a generative band that locks to your tempo/key), **paired with a real-instrument verification pass** (onset/tempo/key tracking quality is the whole headline and is unauditioned). OR `332-overtone-mirror` (the voice‚Üíovertone-series mirror, but mind the voice‚ÜíHRTF‚Üísacred rut ‚Äî needs a non-SVG renderer this time) OR `339-slow-machine` (long-form generative, reliable, but lower surprise).
- **Renderer math after this ship**: SVG cools (we shipped three.js this fire); **three.js now warming (321 + 337) ‚Äî lean off it next adult**; WebGPU 2√ó still unrun (`323`/`327` ‚Äî verification debt unpaid; can't run a real GPU in the sandbox); Canvas2D still jury-banned. - **JURY alignment**: the most faithful answer to **provocation #3** (real-world-data ‚Äî the thinnest adult shelf ‚Äî sonified as a *3-D globe*, not the banked SVG); dodges the SVG renderer ban (‚â•5√ó) + the Canvas2D ban + the his-recording-as-source flag + the forming voice‚ÜíHRTF‚Üísacred rut + the Anadol-cloud flag; pays the **most** respect to verification debt (#5 ‚Äî no new unrun compute, sample fallback guarantees a live review); steps toward #1 legibility (named quakes); resumes kids next cycle (#3); escalates #4 to Karel.

## Cycle 321 ‚Äî 2026-06-05 (UTC) ‚Äî adult build ¬∑ DEEP (3 approaches to ONE concept) ¬∑ SHIPS `331-voice-cathedral` ‚Äî the lab's SECOND non-screen piece, finally following `308-orbit-choir`: sing one steady note and it commits (YIN pitch ‚Üí ~120 ms stability gate ‚Üí 700 ms cooldown + breath-gap, so one breath blooms one voice), snaps to a just-intonation degree over a D2 root, and spawns a sustained additive voice placed at a golden-angle azimuth on a slowly ORBITING ring through its own HRTF `PannerNode`; sing again and again to stack a one-person overtone cathedral around your head, capped at 9 (oldest fades), anchored by an always-on JI drone, kept clip-free by a brick-wall compressor + procedural reverb ‚Äî and the chord you built is printed by NAME (`D ¬∑ A ¬∑ F‚ôØ ¬∑ C‚ôØ`) so Karel RECOGNIZES what he sang (jury #1), not a nebula

**Git sync / env**: clean fire ‚Äî `git fetch && checkout main && pull --ff-only` fast-forwarded `2e98f5e..29d87cd` (HEAD = cycle 320 `330-stillness`; tags pulled). NO force-push divergence. Winner shipped as `331-voice-cathedral`; losers `332-overtone-mirror` + `333-antiphon` moved to `/tmp/dream-losers/` and banked to IDEAS.

**Research-first dive (this fire)** ‚Üí RESEARCH **¬ß321**: *edge-AI pitch/phoneme detection feeding browser HRTF ‚Äî the 2026 "spatial voice instrument" stack.* Sources: *Web Audio API: Immersive Soundscapes for WebXR in 2026* (blog.weskill.org/2026/04) + MDN Web Audio spatialization. Honest freshness (per JURY #5's no-fake-novelty rule): the *techniques* (HRTF `PannerNode`, FFT overtone extraction, YIN) are foundational; the genuinely-recent signal is the **direction-of-field** ‚Äî sound is moving OFF the pixel, and the analysis-to-spatial pipeline (detect which note/overtone live ‚Üí place it by azimuth) is now a routine browser primitive where two years ago it needed native code. That lines up exactly with JURY provocation #2 (build the SECOND non-screen piece ‚Äî `308` found the axis and nothing followed) + #1 (make the music legible ‚Äî name the notes). Chain today's-research ‚Üí today's-build is direct: ¬ß321 ‚Üí the DEEP-3 voice-spatial slate ‚Üí shipped the diversity-clean, most-verifiable, most-directive-faithful winner.

**Decide ‚Äî gates cleared**:
- **Action = Build new (Decide priority #4), JURY-directed + queued**: 321 % 2 = 1 ‚Üí adult (no rotation override needed; kids resumes cycle 322 per JURY #3). No blocker on disk; nothing in-progress <70% (330 shipped demoable last fire). ## Cycle 319 ‚Äî 2026-06-05 (UTC) ‚Äî adult build ¬∑ WIDE (3 explorers) ¬∑ SHIPS `327-physarum-choir` ‚Äî you don't play notes, you plant TONES AS FOOD, and a living slime-mold network decides over seconds which to connect: ~1,048,576 Physarum agents run in a WGSL `@compute` shader (sense-ahead-L/C/R ‚Üí steer to the strongest chemoattractant ‚Üí atomic deposit ‚Üí 3√ó3 diffuse/decay/food-inject ping-pong), Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano seeds the food nodes (onset+pitch ‚Üí JI position), and a reduce+`mapAsync` readback measures how strongly the slime has reached each node ‚Üí that connectivity drives a D-rooted just-intonation choir where each node's voice swells in as the network joins it, so the live chord IS the live topology ‚Äî the slime composes the harmony

## Cycle 316 ‚Äî 2026-06-05 (UTC) ‚Äî kids build ¬∑ DEEP (2 approaches) ¬∑ SHIPS `322-kids-voice-garden` ‚Äî a 4-year-old GROWS a living musical garden with their VOICE: sing/hum ‚Üí light appears (pitch = how high in the sky, loudness = how fast) ‚Üí glowing branches *race toward the sound* via a real **space-colonization** algorithm and bloom notes; the garden keeps its real wall-clock age in localStorage (fuller every morning) and journeys harmonically over the session, so it's a genuinely different garden ‚Äî and key of music ‚Äî at minute 5

We had **never** built space colonization (tips compete for + consume attractor points) or differential growth (a self-avoiding chain that buckles into coral folds). Chain today's-research ‚Üí today's-build = **path (a)**: ¬ß316 ‚Üí DEEP-2 kids fire (one concept, two never-used growth algorithms) ‚Üí ship the strongest.

Its value is the **reframe**: it turns "deepen 308 with real stems" from a timbre swap into a *bigger idea* ‚Äî **his album, spatially exploded into a room you gather with your head**. Chain today's-research ‚Üí today's-build = **path (a)+(b)**: continues the standing multi-cycle spatial thread (b) AND implements the Motet hook + 308's own un-built README deepenings (a).

STATE ¬ß308 queued cycle 309 verbatim as *"the headline: DEEPEN `308-orbit-choir` with Karel's real Welcome Home piano stems ‚Ä¶ multi-cycle thread #3 reaching cycle 2."* **JURY.md (2026-06-04) provocation #1 governs**: *"Deepen 308 with Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano stems ‚Äî do NOT ship a sixth sensor-noodle. The non-screen spatial thread is the freshest thing the lab owns and the README already specs it (real stems + haptics + localStorage persistence). The standing 'use his actual music' directive has *never* reached the spatial layer."* This is exactly that build.
- **Mode: solo DEEP-continue (not WIDE/DEEP fan-out)** ‚Äî the orchestration WIDE/DEEP modes fan out *new* folders; an in-place deepen of one existing multi-cycle folder can't be parallelized into isolated folders. Precedent: cycle 305 was likewise a *"deepen (solo)"* of `302-mirror-canon-round`. Recorded `mode: solo-deepen (multi-cycle thread #3 ‚Üí cycle 2)`.
- **What shipped (`308-orbit-choir` cycle 2)** ‚Äî three deepenings, all from 308's own README "Next-cycle deepening" list, plus the Motet reframe:
  1. **Real stems (the headline).** The 7 synth voices are replaced by Karel's actual recordings via the public, anon, no-auth `/api/featured` (lists his featured album's track recording-ids + titles) ‚Üí `/api/audio/[id]` (signed URL per track) ‚Äî the SAME path the loved `227-paths-granular`‚ù§Ô∏è / `163-paths-visualizer`‚ù§Ô∏è use. `loadStems()` picks the album whose name/artist matches `welcome|karel` (else first), spreads up to 7 tracks evenly, `Promise.allSettled`s per-track fetch ‚Üí `decodeAudioData`. Each becomes a looping `AudioBufferSource` ‚Üí lowpass (the blur/sharpen axis) ‚Üí breathing-LFO gain ‚Üí its own HRTF `PannerNode`. The arc now glides **`playbackRate` (detuned ‚Üí 1.0)** + **lowpass cutoff (‚âà540 Hz ‚Üí ‚âà6 kHz)** instead of oscillator pitch ‚Äî so each recording goes from a warbling, muffled distance to clear-and-true while orbiting inward: **you gather his album into a clear room around your head** (the *Forty Part Motet* of his own piano).
  2. **Haptics ‚Äî a lab FIRST** (`navigator.vibrate`): a 26 ms buzz the instant a voice *you're facing* locks home (`progress‚â•0.92 && swell>0.35`, latched once via `resolvedFired`), and a `[18,40,18]` triple-pulse when the whole room resolves.
  3. **Persistence** (`localStorage` key `resonance.dream.orbit-choir.gather.v1`): gather-progress is written ~every 4 s (monotonic); on return the idle button reads **"Return to the room"** + an emerald *"your room was N% gathered ‚Äî it remembers"* note, and `startTimeRef` is offset so the arc **resumes** where it left off. "Begin again" + full resolve clear it.
- **Graceful fallback is load-bearing**: `<2` tracks decode (offline / private preview / CDN block / no featured album) ‚Üí reverts to the **original cycle-1 synth resolving-chord choir** with the full pitch-glide path intact; the top label states which source plays (`Karel's Welcome Home ¬∑ N voices` vs `synthesised choir (album offline)`). The synth code path is fully preserved, so a no-network sandbox still demos. Also added: a faced-voice **track-title** readout, a `loading` phase ("Gathering the room‚Ä¶"), and stem `src` nodes added to the teardown.
- **Ambition floor: 4/5** (need 2): `ambition: never-used-technique(#1) + ‚â•3-subsystems(#2) + named-reference(#3) + multi-cycle(#4)`. **#1** ‚Äî first `navigator.vibrate` HAPTIC output in 300+ prototypes AND first time a real audio *source* drives the spatial/HRTF layer. **#2** ‚Äî DeviceOrientation head-tracker + N-voice HRTF panner scene + featured-album fetch/decode pipeline + convolver reverb + 360 s convergence state machine + localStorage room-memory (‚âà6). **#3** ‚Äî Janet Cardiff *The Forty Part Motet* (2001, touring 2026) + La Monte Young *Dream House* + Pauline Oliveros. **#4** ‚Äî multi-cycle thread #3 reaching cycle 2 (it was claimed as a multi-cycle commitment in 308's README). (Honest: #5 not strictly claimed ‚Äî ¬ß309 is a path-(b)/(c) dive, not a <30-day frontier find; the four above already clear the floor 2√ó.)
- **Diversity audit** (last 10 shipped: 290,291,293,295,298,302,303,306,308,311; JURY 2026-06-04 bans): `diversity: banned=[raw-WebGL2-fragment-shader OUTPUT ¬∑ phone-motion/orientation-as-screen-object INPUT ¬∑ no-fail-modal-noodle KIDS FORM ¬∑ C-major-pentatonic] ¬∑ picked(308 cyc2)=[adult-meditative VIBE ¬∑ DeviceOrientation-as-LISTENER-rotation INPUT (rotates the audio listener, not a screen object) ¬∑ pure-spatial-HRTF-AUDIO OUTPUT (screen is a footnote; the lab's only non-screen output) ¬∑ real-recording-source + HRTF-convergence + haptics + localStorage TECHNIQUE ¬∑ A-natural-minor-add9 (synth fallback) / Karel's-own-keys (stems)]`. Dodges every banned tag ‚Äî and it's the only adult-spatial / non-screen axis in the lab, so it cannot collide with the kids-shader monoculture the JURY flagged.
- **Love signal** (`/api/dream/votes`, 32 loved): strongly endorses this pick ‚Äî `227-paths-granular`‚ù§Ô∏è + `163-paths-visualizer`‚ù§Ô∏è (his **real Paths/album audio**, the exact `/api/featured`+`/api/audio` path reused here) and `148-spatial-palette`‚ù§Ô∏è + `107-ocean-presence`‚ù§Ô∏è (spatial/immersive). The "use his real music in an immersive spatial piece" direction is directly love-backed.

## Cycle 308 ‚Äî 2026-06-04 (UTC) ‚Äî kids build ¬∑ WIDE (3 explorers) ¬∑ SHIPS `311-kids-music-box` ‚Äî the lab's FIRST kids piece that REMEMBERS across sessions

**Git sync / env**: clean fire ‚Äî `git fetch && checkout main && pull --ff-only` fast-forwarded `2e98f5e..c2b8cd9` (HEAD = cycle 307 `308-orbit-choir`; the `jury: verdict 2026-06-04` commit also landed). NO force-push divergence (3rd clean sync running ‚Äî the recurring drift continues to stay fixed). On-disk **AGENT.md was the current full 385-line version** (AMBITION & DIVERSITY + MULTI-AGENT ORCHESTRATION present). `node_modules` shipped absent ‚Üí `npm ci` (exit 0) before the authoritative build. Worked directly on main; scoped `git add` to `docs/dreams/` + `src/app/dream/311-kids-music-box/`. Highest committed folder = 308 ‚Üí pre-allocated **309/310/311** to the three WIDE builders (collision-free on disk). Winner shipped as `311-kids-music-box`; losers `309-kids-echo-duet` + `310-kids-sing-back` moved to `/tmp/dream-losers/` (fallback retention) and banked to IDEAS.

**Research-first dive (this fire)** ‚Üí RESEARCH **¬ß308**: *reflexive interaction ‚Äî a system that mirrors/varies the child's own input (Pachet's **Continuator**, 2002; Addessi's **MIROR** project) ‚Äî is the validated way to make a kids music piece engaging WITHOUT a no-fail wash; it carries the experience on **memory + turn-taking**, not endless forgiving noodling.* Honest per JURY #5: a **path-(b)/(c)** dive (Continuator/MIROR are foundational; the only strictly-recent dated anchor is a Jan-2026 executive-function meta-analysis about *benefits*, not technique). The value is the **principle** ‚Äî exactly the theory for discharging JURY #2 ("build a kids piece with memory or consequence"). Chain today's-research ‚Üí today's-build = **path (a)+(b)**: all three explorers implement "carry the kids experience on memory, not a no-fail bed"; the winner ships.

- **Action = Kid-cycle rotation (Decide priority #3)**: 308 % 2 = 0; no blocker; the queued adult 308-orbit-choir deepening is explicitly assigned to cycle 309 (an *adult* fire) by STATE ¬ß307. STATE ¬ß306/¬ß307 queued cycle 308 as the kids build (decide clap-band's fate / break the recipe). **JURY.md (2026-06-04) is decisive and governs**: provocation #2 ‚Äî "**Break the kids recipe.** Five straight kids fires are 'new sensor ‚Üí no-fail modal bed.' Ban that form for one kids cycle: build a kids piece with **memory or consequence** ‚Äî the child can make something *wrong* and fix it, or what they did *persists and grows*. `298-echo-friend` already pointed this way; nothing followed it." The JURY's banned set this cycle: **raw-WebGL2-fragment-shader OUTPUT ¬∑ phone-motion/orientation INPUT ¬∑ the new-sensor‚Üíno-fail-modal-noodle KIDS FORM ¬∑ C-major-pentatonic.** (Note: JURY #1 ‚Äî deepen 308 with Karel's real piano stems ‚Äî is explicitly "the next *adult* build" ‚Üí deferred to cycle 309.)
- **Mode: WIDE (3 explorers)** ‚Äî cycle 307 was DEEP; alternation + the anti-similarity mandate ‚Üí WIDE. Three **distinct kids FORMS that all carry memory/consequence**, each dodging every banned tag: (309) Continuator/MIROR call-and-response **duet** (memory + turn-taking), (310) Simon-grows memory game with **real-but-kind right/wrong** (consequence), (311) rotating music-box **sequencer that persists to localStorage** (persists + grows). Pre-allocated 309/310/311; spawned 3 folder-isolated Builder subagents **in parallel** (single message). None touched git or shared docs; none needed an API route (pure client-side Web Audio + Canvas2D/three.js + localStorage; no mic, no camera, no network, no secrets ‚Üí no `guard`).
- **Curation ‚Üí WINNER `311-kids-music-box`**: I verified from the **actual code + READMEs + the authoritative build**, not builder self-reports (309/310 builders again mis-reported some helper files as "pre-existing" ‚Äî the recurring memory artifact; code is genuinely theirs, created 14:08‚Äì14:11 during the run). **Why 311 won**: (a) 309 and 310 are *both* Canvas2D-creature-with-pads pieces ‚Äî the lab's over-represented form (JURY: 13/15 outputs to a screen, mostly the same way); 311 is the only candidate that breaks that pattern with a **3D physical-object metaphor** AND dodges the banned fragment-shader monoculture. (b) It's the **"massively bigger" pick** per Karel's standing mandate ‚Äî a *composition machine* the child builds, not a reactive toy. (c) **localStorage persistence is a genuine lab-first for kids** ‚Äî no kids prototype has ever remembered state across sessions; it hits JURY #2's "*what they did persists and grows*" verbatim. The curating fire also fixed a real **pluck-alignment bug** (comb angle a quarter-turn off the visible comb) + two TS `Float32Array<ArrayBuffer>` generic mismatches before validating. 309 (tightest research chain) + 310 (most literal "wrong and fix it") banked as strong ship-ready seeds.
- **Ambition floor: 3/5** (need 2): `ambition: ‚â•3-subsystems(#2) + named-reference(#3) + recent-research(#5)`. **#2** ‚Äî KS audio engine + three.js/r3f 3D scene + per-frame sequencer clock + localStorage persistence = 4 subsystems. **#3** ‚Äî Swiss cylinder musical box (c.1796, Geneva) + Karplus-Strong (1983). **#5** ‚Äî RESEARCH ¬ß308 (reflexive interaction), added this fire. (Honest: KS isn't a lab-first technique ‚Äî used in 303/105 ‚Äî so #1 not claimed; persistence-across-sessions is arguably a lab-first but counted under the cleaner #2/#3/#5.)
- **Diversity audit** (last 10 shipped/banked: 290,291,293,295,298,302,303,306,308 + banked 304/305; JURY's explicit bans this cycle): `diversity: banned=[raw-WebGL2-fragment-shader OUTPUT ¬∑ phone-motion/orientation INPUT ¬∑ no-fail-modal-noodle KIDS FORM ¬∑ C-major-pentatonic] ¬∑ picked(311)=[touch-slot INPUT ¬∑ three.js-3D-object OUTPUT ¬∑ physical-sequencer + Karplus-Strong + localStorage-persistence TECHNIQUE ¬∑ warm-toy/craft kids VIBE ¬∑ D-Lydian-hexachord]`. Dodges every banned tag ‚Äî and the winner specifically breaks the Canvas2D-creature form its own two siblings shared.
- **Love signal** (`/api/dream/votes`, 32 loved, unchanged set): the loop/memory + tactile/craft cluster pulls here ‚Äî `172-loop-station`‚ù§Ô∏è, `160-kids-paint-loop`‚ù§Ô∏è, `169-kids-marble-run`‚ù§Ô∏è (loop/memory), `105-pluck-field`‚ù§Ô∏è (the physical-pluck/Karplus timbre 311 uses), `111-kids-shape-loop`‚ù§Ô∏è, `100-kids-paint-song`‚ù§Ô∏è. No single love forced the pick; kid-rotation + JURY #2 + the ambition/diversity gates governed.

**What shipped (`311-kids-music-box`)**: a near-black warm screen; tap **Start** (resumes AudioContext, loads the saved tune or seeds a simple D-Lydian one so the box is already singing). A slowly-rotating 3D **music-box cylinder** (three.js via @react-three/fiber): wooden barrel + brass caps, a fixed color-coded **comb** that plucks each pin as it rolls past, raised colored **pin studs** that "pop"+glow on pluck. Grid = 14 time-steps around the circumference √ó 6 pitch-rows along the length; **tap a front-face slot** to add/remove a pin (front-face-only via a surface-normal¬∑camera test on an invisible hit-grid kept in lockstep with the body). The pin pattern **persists to `localStorage`** (try/catch degrade), so the loop keeps playing while the child rearranges it and the box **remembers across reloads** ‚Äî the whole point. Audio = **Karplus-Strong** plucked tones (one KS-rendered `AudioBuffer` per pitch: filtered noise burst ‚Üí tuned delay line with lowpass-averaging feedback ‚Üí A/R envelope), fired as cheap `BufferSource`s through a synthesized convolver reverb + a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter + 0.55 master so dense patterns stay safe. **D Lydian hexachord** (D E F# G# A B ‚Äî NOT C-major-pentatonic). Controls: üßπ Start fresh (clear), ‚è∏ Hold / ‚ñ∂ Spin. No-reading (colors = notes, studs = melody; a tiny caption for the grown-up). Fallbacks: no WebGL ‚Üí `text-rose-300` notice; no Web Audio ‚Üí notice, box still spins. Audio disposed on unmount. Kids ¬∑ zero new deps ¬∑ zero API route ¬∑ no guard ¬∑ 4.74 kB. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** ‚Äî unverified: KS timbre by ear (per-row brightness/damping), tap accuracy + felt pluck timing on a real touch device, three.js disposal across a live unmount.

**Validate**: `npm ci` (exit 0) ‚Üí moved 309 + 310 to `/tmp/dream-losers/` ‚Üí authoritative `npm run build` with **only 311 present** ‚Üí **exit 0**, `/dream/311-kids-music-box ‚óã (Static) 4.74 kB` (347 kB First Load JS ‚Äî the three.js/r3f bundle, expected for a 3D piece), all 339 static pages generated. **No fix attempts needed** (the builder had already fixed the pluck-alignment + TS-generic issues). Zero warnings/errors attributable to 311; remaining warnings are pre-existing non-dream Resonance code.

**What's queued next**:
- **Cycle 309 (adult) ‚Äî JURY #1, the headline: DEEPEN `308-orbit-choir` with Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano stems.** The non-screen spatial thread is the freshest thing the lab owns and the README already specs it: (a) replace synth voices with his real piano stems via `/api/audio/[id]` (the standing "use his actual music" directive has NEVER reached the spatial layer), (b) `navigator.vibrate` haptic pulse when a faced voice resolves (first haptic output), (c) localStorage persistence of how far you'd gathered the room. This is multi-cycle thread #3 reaching cycle 2.
- **Cycle 310 (kids): ship a banked memory/consequence sibling** ‚Äî `310-kids-sing-back` (Simon-grows, real-but-kind right/wrong ‚Äî the cleanest "make something wrong and fix it") OR `309-kids-echo-duet` (Continuator duet) ‚Äî both build-verified this fire. Continue breaking the recipe (JURY #2); do NOT regress to a sensor-noodle.
- **Standing breadth still unshipped**: real-world-data sonification (JURY #3 ‚Äî RESEARCH ¬ß289 seismic, only 1 entry and it's kids+pentatonic); AI-pipeline-chain embedded in AV (JURY #4 ‚Äî RESEARCH ¬ß285, Karel's explicit directive, ZERO in last 15); `282-ensemble-tabs` (first networked/BroadcastChannel, never shipped).
- **Housekeeping (open since 269)**: INDEX "Newest/Previous/Earlier/Older" chain is getting deep + STATE ordering is mixed; worth a reconcile in a polish cycle.

**Notes**:
- **No API route / no `guard`** ‚Äî pure client-side Web Audio + three.js + localStorage; no mic, camera, network, or secrets. Within the scope fence (`src/app/dream/**` + `docs/dreams/**`). **No new npm deps** (`npm ci` from the existing lockfile; three/@react-three were already in package.json ‚Äî package.json/lock untouched + excluded from the commit).
- **WIDE-3 orchestration = the portfolio choreography**: planner sets 3 distinct briefs (3 memory/consequence FORMS) ‚Üí 3 parallel folder-isolated makers ‚Üí critic reads the actual code + READMEs + runs the authoritative build + enforces taste/diversity (shipped the one that breaks the form its siblings shared) ‚Üí curator ships one validated winner + 2 ready-to-revive seeds. Directly answers Karel's "too similar / massively bigger" mandate by exploring three unrelated kids directions in one fire and shipping the biggest.
- **JURY alignment**: discharges provocation #2 (break the kids recipe ‚Äî memory/consequence, recipe banned) cleanly; defers #1 (deepen 308 with real piano) to the next *adult* cycle as the JURY itself directs.

## Cycle 307 ‚Äî 2026-06-04 (UTC) ‚Äî adult build ¬∑ DEEP (2 approaches) ¬∑ SHIPS `308-orbit-choir` ‚Äî the lab's FIRST non-screen / audio-first spatial piece

**Git sync / env**: clean this fire ‚Äî `git fetch && checkout main && pull --ff-only` fast-forwarded `2e98f5e..015d8c8` (HEAD = cycle 306 `306-kids-rain-shaker`); NO force-push divergence (2nd clean sync running). On-disk **AGENT.md was the current full 385-line version** (AMBITION & DIVERSITY + MULTI-AGENT ORCHESTRATION present) ‚Äî the recurring stale-AGENT drift did NOT recur. `node_modules` shipped absent ‚Üí `npm ci` before the authoritative build. Worked directly on main; scoped `git add` to `docs/dreams/` + `src/app/dream/308-orbit-choir/`. Highest committed folder = 306; pre-allocated **307/308** to the two DEEP builders (collision-free on disk). Winner shipped as `308-orbit-choir`; loser `307-still-room` removed after curation and banked to IDEAS.

**Research-first dive (this fire)** ‚Üí RESEARCH **¬ß307**: *head MOVEMENT (not position) is what makes generic browser-HRTF legible* ‚Äî arXiv:2510.09161 (HRTF individualisation + head movements). Empirically, active head-turning collapses the front/back & in-head confusions that Web Audio's generic `panningModel="HRTF"` suffers ‚Äî so the cheap generic browser HRTF becomes legible **iff the listener turns**, which is exactly what a phone's `DeviceOrientation` already affords. The build's core gesture IS the disambiguator. Chain today's-research ‚Üí today's-build = **path (a)+(c)**: implements ¬ß295's un-spent head-tracked-spatial shelf.

- **Action = banked adult breadth (Decide priority #4, JURY-directed pivot)**: 307 % 2 = 1 ‚Üí adult. STATE ¬ß305/¬ß306 queued cycle 307 as *Mirror-Canon CYCLE 3 polish* **only if the thread still feels alive after 3 cycles; else pivot to banked adult breadth*. I pivoted ‚Äî the Mirror-Canon thread (303 ship + 305 deepen) has demonstrated the multi-cycle commitment the JURY asked for; a 3rd polish fire would be incremental. **JURY.md (2026-06-03) is decisive and points elsewhere**: provocation #3 ("the lab has banked three spatial/non-screen pieces and shipped ZERO ‚Äî resurrect one and SHIP it"), #4 ("build on the unused half of RESEARCH ¬ß295 ‚Äî the head-tracked-spatial-audio finding that produced `still-room`, banked not shipped"), #5 ("for one cycle, ban the audio‚Üívisual driver entirely ‚Äî build something whose output isn't a screen visualizer"). All three resolve to the same banked piece. This is "ship the breadth you've already paid for."
- **Mode: DEEP (2 approaches to one concept)** ‚Äî concept = the lab's first audio-FIRST / non-screen HRTF spatial room navigated by head-turn. Approach A = `307-still-room` (faithful Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*: 7 fixed-bearing voices, turn to tune in). Approach B = `308-orbit-choir` (the same spatial foundation given a **6-minute long-form, stateful convergence arc** ‚Äî voices orbit inward + glide from a detuned cluster into a warm A-minor-add9 chord; you shepherd voices home by facing them). Pre-allocated 307/308; spawned 2 folder-isolated Builder subagents **in parallel** (single message). Neither touched git or shared docs; neither needed an API route (pure Web Audio + `DeviceOrientation`, no mic, no camera, no network, no secrets ‚Üí no `guard`).
- **Curation ‚Üí WINNER `308-orbit-choir`**: 308 is the strict superset ‚Äî it contains everything still-room does (HRTF room + DeviceOrientation listener-rotation + faced-voice swell + Deep-Listening framing) **plus** the long-form/stateful arc the JURY explicitly craves ("different at minute 6 than minute 0"), which fills the categorical-menu's *long-form generative (5+ min, state/memory/evolution)* gap the lab is thin on. Both built clean (full `npm run build` with both present = exit 0; each agent reported clean tsc + ESLint). Removed `307-still-room`, re-ran the **authoritative build winner-only = exit 0** (`/dream/308-orbit-choir` 3.92 kB). `307-still-room` banked to IDEAS as the calmer fixed-room sibling.
- **Ambition floor: 4/5** ‚Äî `#1 never-used technique` (FIRST HRTF spatial-audio output + FIRST `DeviceOrientation` listener-rotation in 300+ prototypes ‚Äî the lab has avoided HRTF for 300 cycles; grep INDEX = 0 shipped spatial pieces despite 3 banked) ¬∑ `#2 ‚â•3 subsystems` (DeviceOrientation head-tracker + HRTF panner graph + 7-voice synth scene + synthesized convolver reverb + a 6-min azimuth+pitch convergence state machine = 4-5) ¬∑ `#3 named reference` (La Monte Young *Dream House*, √âliane Radigue, Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*) ¬∑ `#5 recent research` (RESEARCH ¬ß307 / ¬ß295, this fire + within-14-days). Recorded `ambition: novel-technique(#1) + ‚â•3-subsystems(#2) + named-ref(#3) + recent-research(#5)`.
- **Diversity audit** (last 10: 290,291,293,295,298,302,303,306 + banked 304/305): over-represented = kids VIBE (5√ó: 290/293/295/298/303/306), tilt/deviceorientation-orientation INPUT (290/293/303/306), matte-Canvas2D + raw-WebGL OUTPUT (most). `diversity: banned=[kids-vibe, tilt-orientation-input, matte-canvas/webgl-visual-output, pentatonic] ¬∑ picked=[adult-meditative VIBE ¬∑ device-orientation-HEADING-as-listener-rotation INPUT (a NEW use of the sensor ‚Äî rotates the audio listener, not a screen object) ¬∑ pure-spatial-HRTF-audio OUTPUT (screen is a faint footnote ‚Äî the FIRST build whose output is not a screen visualizer) ¬∑ long-form-convergence + HRTF TECHNIQUE]`. Directly executes JURY #5 ("ban the audio‚Üívisual driver") ‚Äî this is the lab's first piece where sound is the content and the screen is the footnote.
- **Love signal**: votes API shows loved spatial/immersive pieces ‚Äî `148-spatial-palette` ‚ù§Ô∏è, `107-ocean-presence` ‚ù§Ô∏è, `227-paths-granular` ‚ù§Ô∏è, `130-tsl-particle-compute` ‚ù§Ô∏è. No shipped HRTF piece existed to love; this is the first. Pulled toward the immersive-room direction those loves imply.

**What shipped (`308-orbit-choir`)**: near-black audio-first screen; tap "Begin the orbit" (resumes AudioContext + requests iOS `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` in the same gesture). 7 sustained HRTF-panned voices start scattered + detuned into a soft cluster; over a 360s eased scheduler they orbit inward to an even ring **and** their pitches glide (`setTargetAtTime`) into a warm **A natural-minor add9 / stacked-fifth** chord ‚Äî so spatial field and harmony resolve together. `DeviceOrientation.alpha` rotates the `AudioListener` (modern `forwardX/Z`+`positionX/Y/Z` AudioParams AND legacy `setOrientation`/`setPosition` both feature-detected for Safari/old-Chrome); facing a voice swells it and floors its personal resolution forward, so you *shepherd voices home* and shape the pace. Synthesized convolver reverb (decaying filtered-noise impulse, no files). Fallback chain: sensor ‚Üí pointer-drag ‚Üí arrow keys ‚Üí hands-free auto-tour, with a readable `text-rose-300` notice when the sensor's inactive (separate notice if Web Audio is absent). Thin violet progress ring + `M:SS ‚Äî state` label (`scattered ‚Üí drifting in ‚Üí gathering ‚Üí almost home ‚Üí resolved`) + "Begin again" hold state + a faint violet orbital-map canvas (guide, not the point). Full ref-based teardown on unmount. Headphones hint (HRTF needs binaural). Adult ¬∑ zero new deps ¬∑ zero API route ¬∑ no guard ¬∑ 3.92 kB. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** ‚Äî unverified: whether generic Web-Audio HRTF externalizes convincingly on a real phone + headphones (the whole bet rides on this), whether the 6-min arc reads as "arrival" vs. a slow wash, the shepherding feel, and front/back disambiguation on a real DeviceOrientation stream.

**Notes**:
- **No API route / no `guard`** ‚Äî pure Web Audio + `DeviceOrientation`, all client-side; no mic, no camera, no recording, no network, no secrets. Within the scope fence. **No new npm deps** (`npm ci` from the existing lockfile only; package.json/lock untouched + excluded from the commit).
- The design-notes link points at `/dream/308-orbit-choir/README.md` (lab convention ‚Äî App Router won't serve README as a route, so the link 404s; carried, matches prior prototypes, not a build blocker ‚Äî worth a future `_shared` notes-viewer).

**What's queued next**:
- **Cycle 308 (kids)**: 308 % 2 = 0 ‚Üí kids. **DECIDE `304-kids-clap-band`'s fate** ‚Äî now thrice-banked (strongest-floor rhythm lane but keeps losing on experience): either ship it outright (the missing rhythm/percussion lane; pairs with 298 pitch / 303 tilt / 306 shake) or deliberately retire it. `305-kids-blow-sail` (calm breath) also available. Must dodge JURY's kids bans (touch-input + matte-canvas + pentatonic-poke).
- **Cycle 309+ (adult): DEEPEN `308-orbit-choir` (multi-cycle thread #3)** ‚Äî the README's three deepenings: (a) replace synth voices with Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano stems (the standing "use his actual music" directive), (b) `navigator.vibrate` haptic pulse the instant a faced voice reaches full resolution (first haptic output), (c) `localStorage` persistence so the room remembers how far you'd gathered it across sessions. OR ship the banked `307-still-room` (faithful fixed-room Deep Listening sibling) as a calmer companion. OR remaining banked breadth: `282-ensemble-tabs` (first networked/BroadcastChannel ‚Äî JURY #3, still never shipped).
- **Mirror-Canon thread**: parked at cycle 2 (`302`); its planned cycle-3 polish is deferred in favor of opening the spatial thread. Revivable if a vote signal asks.

Dodges every banned tag: devicemotion (not touch, a fresh axis vs. 303's tilt), raw-WebGL2 (not three.js/matte-Canvas2D), D-Dorian (not pentatonic). **Curation note:** the builder shipped *additive* point-sprites (against the JURY's anti-glow house style) ‚Äî I switched the blend to **matte premultiplied alpha-over** (`gl.ONE, gl.ONE_MINUS_SRC_ALPHA`, correct given the frag's premultiplied output) during curation so the winner respects the non-additive ban.

I (Orchestrator/Planner/Curator) verified from the **actual code + READMEs + an authoritative build**, not builder self-reports (all three again mis-reported some helper files as "already present/seeded" ‚Äî the recurring memory artifact; the code is genuinely theirs, created 10:10‚Äì10:17 during the run).

## Cycle 305 ‚Äî 2026-06-04 (UTC) ‚Äî adult build ¬∑ DEEPEN (solo) ¬∑ Mirror-Canon CYCLE 2 ‚Äî folds Round‚áÑPhase into `302-mirror-canon-round`

Followed the mandate as carried in the cycle brief. Flagged again in MORNING ‚Äî worth pinning AGENT.md from Karel's side.

**Research-first**: this build chains directly off **RESEARCH ¬ß303** (the Mirror-Canon DEEP fire's dive: loop-pedal one-person-choir + canon/round tradition + **Steve Reich phasing** + Daniel Rozin *Wooden Mirror*) ‚Äî the same dive that produced cycle 303's `302` and its banked phasing sibling `301-mirror-canon-phase`. No new research dive this fire (research-first rule **path (b)**: a recent dive is still the load-bearing idea, < 2 cycles old; cycle 303's STATE + 302's README both spec'd this exact cycle-2 step). Steve Reich *Piano Phase* (1967) is the named anchor the phasing law `(1 + n¬∑0.012)` implements.

**Love signal** (`/api/dream/votes`, 32 loved): no Mirror-Canon slug is loved yet, but the **loop/memory + embodied/body cluster** points squarely here ‚Äî `172-loop-station`‚ù§Ô∏è, `160-kids-paint-loop`‚ù§Ô∏è, `169-kids-marble-run`‚ù§Ô∏è (loop/memory), `217-dance-avatar`‚ù§Ô∏è, `234-kids-hand-creature`‚ù§Ô∏è, `104-kids-mirror-draw`‚ù§Ô∏è, `101-camera-song`‚ù§Ô∏è (body/camera). The phase-cloud "your selves slipping apart, never repeating" deepens this evolving-loop-of-you vein. No single love forced the pick; the queued multi-cycle thread + JURY #1 governed.

**Decide ‚Äî gates cleared**:
- **Action = Continue/Deepen (Decide priority #2)**: cycle 304's STATE explicitly queued **cycle 305 = Mirror-Canon CYCLE 2 ‚Äî fold `301`'s Steve Reich phasing engine into `302` as a Round‚áÑPhase mode toggle**, and `302`'s own README lists it as the designated cycle-2 deepening with the exact drift law. 305 % 2 = 1 ‚Üí adult, matching `302`'s lane. This advances the lab's **2nd multi-cycle thread** (after 291-harmonograph) ‚Äî the direct discharge of the JURY's #1 standing provocation ("stop shipping orphans; pick ONE thing and deepen it over 2‚Äì3 cycles; `287` is the candidate").
- **Mode: solo (deepen-in-place)** ‚Äî not WIDE/DEEP orchestration. The cycle-2 spec is a single, fully-defined change (the phasing engine already designed in the banked `301` sibling), so there is no "2 orthogonal approaches" to explore; the absolute is *don't break Karel's app*, and a single fully-controlled deepening of an already-build-verified piece is the most reliable green-deploy. (Cycles 293/294 set the solo-when-safer precedent.)
- **Ambition floor** ‚Äî cleared **2 of 5** (need 2): `ambition: multi-cycle-commitment(#4) + named-reference(#3, Steve Reich Piano Phase)`.
  - **(#4) Multi-cycle commitment** ‚Äî cycle 2 of the Mirror-Canon thread (the lab's 2nd genuine multi-cycle build); cyc303 birth ‚Üí cyc305 phasing ‚Üí cyc306+ polish. Headline.
  - **(#3) Named reference** ‚Äî **Steve Reich, *Piano Phase* (1967)** drives the new phasing law, on top of 287/302's carried Rozin/round/Frippertronics/Oliveros/LUMIA lineage (all real/checkable).
  - (#1 novel-technique) ‚Äî NOT claimed (honest): phasing loops aren't a grep lab-first technique; counted under #3/#4.
  - (#2 ‚â•3-subsystems) ‚Äî 302 already has 4; not double-counted as this cycle's novelty.
  - (#5 recent-research) ‚Äî NOT claimed this fire (no new <30-day dive; path-(b) reuse of ¬ß303).
- **Diversity audit** (last-10 shipped {285,286,287,290,291,293,295,298,302,303}; standing JURY over-rep = touch INPUT ¬∑ three.js OUTPUT ¬∑ matte-Canvas2D OUTPUT ¬∑ pentatonic-poke TECHNIQUE ¬∑ kids VIBE): `diversity: action=continue-multi-cycle-build ¬∑ picked(302-cyc2)=[camera/body INPUT ¬∑ matte-wooden-mirror OUTPUT (thread-continuity) ¬∑ phasing/Reich canon-memory TECHNIQUE (NEW axis) ¬∑ adult/embodied/ritual VIBE]`. **Honest flag:** OUTPUT = matte-Canvas2D wooden mirror IS the over-represented output ‚Äî **justified as the mandate's explicit carve-out for continuing a multi-cycle ambitious build** (the Rozin mirror is 287/302's structural signature). The NEW axis carrying the gate is the phasing TECHNIQUE; INPUT (camera/body, not touch), TECHNIQUE, and VIBE (adult, not kids) all dodge the bans.

**What I built (1 commit, deepen-in-place)**:
- **Round ‚áÑ Phase mode toggle** in `302-mirror-canon-round/page.tsx`. Added `CanonMode` + `mode`/`modeRef` state, a `committedAtS` field on each `CanonVoice` (the per-voice drift origin), and `PHASE_DRIFT = 0.012`. Playback step 5 now branches: **Round** = the existing locked `barPhase ‚àí offset`; **Phase** = each voice loops at `BAR_SEC¬∑(1 + i¬∑PHASE_DRIFT)`, clocked from its own commit time, so voice 0 stays locked and later voices slip ‚Äî Steve Reich *Piano Phase*. The round literally never repeats in Phase.
- **Live drift HUD** ‚Äî one tinted marker per active voice showing its current loop position (0..1), throttled to ~10 fps via a frame counter (cheap; the canvas keeps its own rAF). In Round the markers hold fixed offsets; in Phase they slide apart ‚Äî a legible read of the phasing even on Karel's phone.
- A segmented Round/Phase toggle button (44px targets, violet active), mode-aware helper copy, hero + footer updated (added the Reich reference), and the README's multi-cycle section marked cycle 2 **shipped** with cycle 3 (on-hardware tuning + per-voice drift-rate sculpt) queued.

**Validate**: `npm ci` (exit 0) ‚Üí `npm run build`: **‚úì Compiled successfully in 26.7s**, `/dream/302-mirror-canon-round ‚óã (Static) 7.51 kB` (was 6.89 kB cyc303), 338/338 static pages generated, exit 0. **No fix attempts needed.** All build warnings are pre-existing non-dream Resonance code (RotateCcw, journey.id, fonts‚Ä¶), **zero attributable to 302**. Build-verified, **not** browser-verified (no camera/GPU in the sandbox).

- **Cycle 306 (kids)**: ship `299-kids-clap-band` (clap ‚Üí HFC-onset-detection layered groove, Steve Reich *Clapping Music* ‚Äî strongest-floor, build-verified, pairs as a sibling to 298's pitch lane + 303's tilt lane) OR `300-kids-blow-sail` (calm breath lane, Wiener-entropy breath/tone discriminator). Both build-verified, full specs in IDEAS.

**Notes**:
- **No API route / no `guard`** ‚Äî Web Audio + camera (getUserMedia, analysis-only, never recorded/uploaded) + MediaPipe model from jsDelivr CDN (read-only) + Canvas2D, all client-side. Within the scope fence (`src/app/dream/**` + `docs/dreams/**`). **No new npm deps** (`npm ci` from the existing lockfile only; package.json/lock untouched + excluded from the commit).
- **Honesty carry-forward**: 302 cyc2 is **build-verified, not browser-verified**. Unverified surface: (a) the *feel* of `PHASE_DRIFT = 0.012` on real hardware ‚Äî too small and the phasing reads as static over a review-length listen, too large and it sounds out-of-sync rather than phasing (a one-number tweak next fire, never an error); (b) whether the phase cloud reads as "my selves slipping apart" vs. a wash at 4 stacked formant voices through the limiter; (c) whether the ~10 fps drift HUD looks smooth enough to read the slip; (d) carried ‚Äî MediaPipe CDN reliability + the ghost-fallback auto-commit selling the concept at 06:30 (the ghost auto-commits 2 voices so Phase mode demos itself with no camera). All fail safe: the always-on pad keeps it alive, the toggle defaults to Round (the proven cyc1 behaviour), and the build is green.
- **Force-push doc-drift persists** (origin/main force-updated AGAIN; local diverged 50/50; `git reset --hard origin/main`). Harmless to the loop but recurring every fire ‚Äî flagged again in MORNING.

Chain dive ‚Üí build is direct (research-first path (a)): ¬ß293 ‚Üí `285-mosaic-listener`.

**Decided**: Adult cycle (293 % 2 = 1). No blocker, nothing in-progress. The queue named `mosaic-listener` as **"the strongest single bank in the queue ‚Äî schedule it on the next clean-slate adult cycle,"** and this is that cycle. **Rejected the other queued candidates after a prior-art grep**: `5-arcs` ("Journey Arc Engine v2") + `48-arc-compose` **already implement an "EDM Build-and-Drop" / cinematic / ritual arc**, so the journey-engine-alternative direction would be a near-duplicate (the exact "too similar" trap the mandate bans); `271-pigment-mosaic` already shipped the **AI-image-inside-AV** piece (Karel's #1, no longer a 0√ó gap, and the FAL_KEY/no-browser-verify risk is real for an autonomous cycle). `mosaic-listener` is the clean clear-slate pick: a genuinely new synthesis paradigm + bullseye on the "use his real piano" directive.

**Mode**: **solo** (not WIDE/DEEP orchestration). Deliberate: the absolute rule is *the build must pass / don't break Karel's app*, and a single fully-controlled, fully-build-verified piece is the most reliable green-deploy path in budget ‚Äî especially with **raw WebGL2** shaders I can't browser-verify this cycle. Made the piece rich (4 subsystems) to honor the "not a thin solo toy" spirit. (Cycle 290 set this solo precedent and it held.)

- **(1) Novel technique** ‚Äî grepped INDEX + all dream READMEs for `concatenative`/`corpus-based`/`catart`/`audio mosaic`/`timbre-space`: **zero hits ‚Üí first concatenative-synthesis / audio-mosaicing piece in 280+ prototypes.** (`227-paths-granular` is *granular* playback of a single source position; this is *descriptor-matched KNN concatenation* across a tagged corpus ‚Äî a different paradigm.)
- **(3) Named references (verified)** ‚Äî README cites CataRT/Diemo Schwarz, The Concatenator (arXiv 2411.04366, 2024), MACAT/MACataRT (arXiv 2502.00023, 2025), FluCoMa ‚Äî all real & checkable.
- **(2) ‚â•3 subsystems** ‚Äî 4: corpus analysis (grain segmentation + RMS + 256-pt Hann-DFT spectral centroid + ZCR pitch, with synth-corpus *and* real-track-decode paths sharing one buffer-index playback) ¬∑ descriptor-space KNN matcher + Chris-Wilson look-ahead grain scheduler (overlap-add windowed BufferSources ‚Üí lowpass ‚Üí feedback-delay wash ‚Üí limiter) ¬∑ matte WebGL2 atlas render (GL_POINTS, per-grain activation, cursor + trail) ¬∑ target navigation (pointer-drag / auto-drift Lissajous / mic centroid+RMS).
- **(5) Recent research** ‚Äî built directly off this cycle's ¬ß293 dive.
- (4) Multi-cycle ‚Äî not claimed; shipped demoable in one fire (deepen path in README: YIN+MFCC, PCA/UMAP layout, KD-tree, onset-aligned grains, MACataRT factor-oracle).

**Diversity audit** (last 10 committed by folder = 267,268,271,272,275,276,279,280,283,284):
`diversity: banned=[canvas2d-output(5√ó: 271,272,275,279,280) ¬∑ three.js-additive-points/glow(JURY hard-ban) ¬∑ C-major-pentatonic(JURY)] ¬∑ picked=[pointer-drag INPUT (mic optional) ¬∑ matte raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT ¬∑ concatenative-synthesis TECHNIQUE(0√ó ever) ¬∑ data-sculpture/his-piano VIBE ¬∑ his-real-piano-grains SOUND (non-pentatonic by source)]`
- **OUTPUT = raw WebGL2 (matte)**: canvas2d hit **5√ó** ‚Üí **BANNED**; three.js 3√ó (267,283,284 ‚Äî under the line but the JURY *additionally* hard-bans glowing three.js point clouds, which a descriptor scatter would read as); SVG 2√ó (268,276); **raw-WebGL2 0√ó in window** ‚Üí cleanest dodge on *both* axes. Used normal premultiplied-alpha blending (matte, no additive) to also satisfy the anti-glow mandate.

Touch-tap was 3√ó (268,272,284), under the line.

- **SOUND**: when the corpus is his real piano the pitches are literally his playing ‚Üí non-pentatonic by source, dodging the C-pentatonic ban without choosing any scale.

**What's new about this prototype**:

Also pre-empted two known traps before the first build: removed an unused CPU `hsv` helper (color is done in GLSL), and swapped an O(N¬∑lag) autocorrelation pitch detector for a cheap O(N) zero-crossing estimate + a dynamic analysis hop, so slicing a multi-minute real track stays sub-second. Build-verified (not browser-verified live ‚Äî see honesty note).

**Notes**:
- **No API route / no `guard` needed** ‚Äî `285` only READS the existing `/api/audio/:id` (no side effects, the loved-`163` pattern) + Web Audio + WebGL2, otherwise fully client-side. Mic is analysis-only (`AnalyserNode`, never connected to destination, never recorded/persisted/transmitted). Within the scope fence (`src/app/dream/**` + `docs/dreams/**`). The procedural-corpus default + auto-drift guarantee a working, self-playing 06:30 review with zero network and zero permissions.
